listings.title: 350-Powered 1978 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
listings.description: This 1978 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was repainted in green with black accents under previous ownership, and it was acquired by the seller on BaT in September 2021. Subsequent work included installing a replacement 350ci Chevrolet V8 crate engine, a Centerforce clutch, Mastercraft Safety front seats, and an Alpine stereo linked to aftermarket…

listings.title: 2006 Mazda MX-5 Miata 5-Speed
listings.description: This 2006 Mazda MX-5 Miata is finished in Galaxy Gray Mica over tan leather and is powered by a 2.0-liter inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transmission. Features include a convertible soft top, 16" five-spoke alloy wheels, fog lights, a CD stereo, power windows, a wind deflector, and air conditioning.

listings.title: Modified 2001 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2001 Honda S2000 was purchased by the seller in 2010, and its modifications include a J's Racing wide-body kit, 18" Rays wheels, Buddy Club coilovers, an AP2 six-speed gearbox, and aftermarket mirrors. Additionally, the 2.0-liter VTEC inline-four received a Link ECU, a Koyo radiator, PLM headers, a Buddy Club exhaust system,…

listings.title: 10k-Mile 2005 Nissan 350Z Enthusiast Coupe 6-Speed
listings.description: This 2005 Nissan 350Z Enthusiast is a Silverstone-over-Carbon cloth coupe that has 10k miles. It was purchased by its current owner in March 2007, and the car has spent most of the intervening years in storage. Power is from a 3.5-liter V6 linked to a six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential, while modifications include an…

listings.title: 1984 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ60
listings.description: This 1984 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ60 spent time in Colorado and Idaho, where it was acquired by the seller in 2025, and it now shows 131k miles. Finished in Beige over tan and brown upholstery, it is powered by a 4.2-liter 2F inline-six linked with a four-speed manual transmission and a two-speed transfer case.

listings.title: Vortec-Powered 1976 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 w/Matching Trailer
listings.description: This 1976 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was modified in 2014, including the installation of a 5.3L Vortec V8, a four-speed 4L60E automatic transmission, and an Orion twin-stick dual-range transfer case. The build also involved adding ARB front and rear air lockers, four-wheel disc brakes, a 4" suspension lift, a 40-gallon fuel cell, and steel bumpers.

listings.title: 50k-Kilometer 1993 Nissan Skyline GT-R V-Spec
listings.description: This 1993 Nissan Skyline GT-R is one of 1,396 V-Spec examples produced and was imported to the US in 2022, when it was purchased by the seller in Japan. Finished in Spark Silver Metallic, the car is powered by a twin-turbocharged 2.6-liter RB26DETT inline-six paired with a five-speed manual transmission, an ATTESA all-wheel-drive system, and a…

listings.title: 30k-Mile 2004 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2004 Honda S2000 was initially delivered to Don Ayres Honda of Fort Wayne, Indiana, and it was acquired in 2012 by the seller, who has since added 4k of the 30k miles. The car is finished in Silverstone Metallic over black leather and is powered by a 2.2-liter VTEC inline-four linked to a six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip…

listings.title: 1981 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
listings.description: This 1981 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 is said to have remained in the care of its original owner until it was acquired by the seller in 2016. Subsequent work has involved repainting the body blue, retrimming the interior in gray vinyl, fitting 15" American Racing wheels wearing 31" Kumho tires, and replacing the carburetor, distributor, fuel pump,…

listings.title: 29-Years-Owned 1969 Datsun 2000 Roadster
listings.description: This 1969 Datsun 2000 roadster spent time in Arizona before it was purchased by the current owner in 1997. It underwent a refurbishment between 2019 and 2026, with work included separating the body from the frame, sheetmetal repairs, re-trimming the interior, overhauling the 2.0-liter U20 inline-four and braking system, replacing the wiring…

listings.title: ICON-Built 1995 Toyota Land Cruiser FZJ80
listings.description: This 1995 Toyota Land Cruiser was acquired by its current owner in 2013, and it subsequently became the subject of a custom build by ICON 4x4 of Chatsworth, California, in 2014. Power comes from a 6.2-liter E-Rod LS3 V8 linked to a 4L65E four-speed automatic transmission, a dual-range transfer case, and a locking center differential, and the truck…

listings.title: 1996 Subaru Sambar 4WD Mini Fire Truck 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1996 Subaru Sambar 4WD mini fire truck was imported to the US in 2026, and it has 10k kilometers (~6k miles). Power is provided by a 658cc inline-four linked with a five-speed manual gearbox and a four-wheel-drive system. The truck is finished in red over gray vinyl, and it is outfitted with a ladder, a slide-out pump tray, an open-air rear…

listings.title: 1972 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
listings.description: This 1972 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 is said to have been refurbished in 2000 and is believed to have later spent time on display in a Toyota dealership. It is finished in green over black vinyl upholstery and is powered by a 3.9-liter inline-six linked with a three-speed manual transmission and a dual-range transfer case.

listings.title: 2000 Toyota Land Cruiser UZJ100
listings.description: This 2000 Toyota Land Cruiser was purchased by its current owner in 2024, and subsequent work involved replacing the alternator, radiator, and cooling-fan clutch as well as fitting 17" Method Race wheels, 35" tires, ADS piggyback shocks, White Knuckle rock sliders, Dissent Off-Road bumpers and skid plates, and more.

listings.title: 1999 Honda Integra Type R
listings.description: This 1999 Honda Integra Type R is a right-hand-drive Japanese-market example that was purchased out of New Zealand by the seller in 2025 and imported to the US in April 2026. It is powered by a 1.8-liter B18C inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transaxle and a helical limited-slip differential.

listings.title: 1974 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
listings.description: This 1974 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was brought to the US under previous ownership, and refurbishments following the seller's 2020 purchase included body repairs, a repaint in green, a front disc brake conversion, installing an HEI distributor, and replacing assorted ignition, fuel delivery, braking, and steering components.

listings.title: 21k-Mile 2007 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2007 Honda S2000 was initially delivered to Richardson Honda of Dubuque, Iowa, and was purchased in 2020 by the current owner, who has since added 1k of the 21k miles. The car is finished in Laguna Blue Pearl over black leather and is powered by a 2.2-liter VTEC inline-four linked to a six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip…

listings.title: B18C-Powered 1995 Honda Civic Hatchback 5-Speed Race Car
listings.description: This 1995 Honda Civic hatchback was built into a race car before the current owner’s purchase in 2018. Power comes from a 1.8-liter B18C VTEC inline-four linked to a five-speed manual transaxle, and the chassis has been updated with a welded roll cage, adjustable front camber plates, and four-wheel disc brakes.

listings.title: One-Owner 2001 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2001 Honda S2000 is a Berlina Black-over-black car that was purchased new by the current owner and has 26k miles. Power is supplied by a 2.0-liter VTEC inline-four linked to a six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential. Equipment includes a black convertible soft top, xenon headlights, 16" five-spoke alloy wheels, air…

listings.title: Original-Owner, 22k-Mile 2000 Acura NSX-T 6-Speed
listings.description: This 2000 Acura NSX-T was leased new by the current owner and subsequently purchased, and it has 22k miles. The car is finished in Spa Yellow Pearl over Onyx leather and is powered by a 3.2-liter DOHC V6 paired with a six-speed manual transaxle. Equipment includes staggered-diameter 16” and 17” aluminum wheels, a limited-slip differential, a…

listings.title: 1978 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
listings.description: This 1978 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 is a California-specification example that was sold on BaT in January 2026 and was recently acquired by the selling dealer. The body wears worn green paint, and the truck is powered by a 4.2-liter inline-six mated to a four-speed manual transmission and a dual-range transfer case.

listings.title: Modified 1980 Mazda RX-7 S
listings.description: This 1980 Mazda RX-7 S was reportedly modified during the 1980s by Petty Engineering of La Mirada, California, where it was fitted with an aftermarket hood, a widebody kit, and a removable roof panel, and it was acquired by the seller in 2008. Powered by a 1.1-liter 12A rotary paired with a five-speed manual transmission, the car is finished in…

listings.title: 1996 Toyota Land Cruiser FZJ80
listings.description: This 1996 Toyota Land Cruiser has been registered in California since new and was acquired by the seller in 2019. A replacement 4.5-liter inline-six was installed in 2021 and the truck was repainted its factory shade of Medium Red Pearl in 2025. Additional work under current ownership has involved installing ARB air lockers with 4.88:1 gearing,…

listings.title: Ex-ScienceofSpeed, Twin-Turbocharged 1992 Acura NSX 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1992 Acura NSX was acquired by Chris Willson of the NSX and S2000–focused tuner ScienceofSpeed in March 2006 and used as a development and promotional vehicle by the Arizona-based shop for over a decade. After being fitted with their Stage 1 Forced Induction Engine package and twin Garrett turbochargers, the car finished first in the 2012…

listings.title: 1,300-Mile 2019 Acura NSX
listings.description: This 2019 Acura NSX was initially delivered to Continental Acura of Naperville in Illinois, and it has 1,300 miles. The car is finished in Curva Red and was optioned with the Carbon Fiber Interior Sport and ELS Studio Audio and Technology packages, as well as an interior trimmed in Ebony leather, an Alcantara headliner, and a carbon-fiber rear…

listings.title: 28k-Mile 2021 Honda Civic Type R Touring
listings.description: This 2021 Honda Civic Type R Touring was specified from the factory with Boost Blue Pearl paint before being delivered new to Bob Boyte Honda of Moss Point, Mississippi, where it was acquired new by the seller. Power comes from a turbocharged 2.0-liter inline-four equipped with a PRL Motorsports air intake assembly and linked with a six-speed…

listings.title: 2026 Toyota GR Supra Final Edition 6-Speed
listings.description: This 2026 Toyota GR Supra is a MkV Final Edition example that was purchased new by the seller from Miller Toyota in Manassas, Virginia, and it now has 2,300 miles. Finished in Burnout over black Alcantara and leather, it is powered by a turbocharged 3.0-liter inline-six linked with a six-speed manual transmission.

listings.title: 2014 Subaru Impreza WRX Premium 5-Speed
listings.description: This 2014 Subaru Impreza WRX Premium was delivered new to Gresham Subaru in Oregon and remained in the care of its original owner until it was acquired by the selling dealer in 2026. Finished in Ice Silver Metallic, the car is powered by a turbocharged 2.5-liter flat-four that turns all four wheels through a five-speed manual transaxle.

listings.title: 2000 Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution VI GSR Tommi Makinen Edition
listings.model: Lancer Evolution VI GSR Tommi Makinen Edition
listings.description: This 2000 Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution VI is a Japanese-market Tommi Mäkinen Edition GSR powered by a turbocharged 2.0-liter inline-four linked with a five-speed manual transaxle and an all-wheel-drive system with a limited-slip differential. The car is finished in Scotia White over black Ecsaine and red cloth, and equipment includes a rear wing,…

listings.title: 17k-Mile, One-Owner 2005 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2005 Honda S2000 was purchased new by its current owner, and it has 17k miles. The car is finished in Silverstone Metallic over black leather and is powered by a 2.2-liter VTEC inline-four linked to a six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential. Features include a black convertible soft top, xenon headlights, a rear wing,…

listings.title: 2F-Powered 1973 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
listings.description: This 1973 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was acquired by its current owner in 2023, and work since then is said to have included repainting the body green and retrofitting a 4.2-liter 2F inline-six equipped with Holley Sniper electronic fuel injection. Shifting is through a four-speed manual transmission linked to a dual-range transfer case, and the…

listings.title: 1994 Toyota Land Cruiser HDJ81 VX Limited Turbodiesel
listings.model: Land Cruiser HDJ81 VX Limited Turbodiesel
listings.description: This 1994 Toyota Land Cruiser VX Limited is a Japanese-market example that was brought to the US in October 2021 and was acquired by the seller in December of that same year. Finished in Black and Topaz Metallic over gray cloth, the truck is powered by a 4.2-liter turbodiesel inline-six mated to a four-speed automatic transmission and a dual-range…

listings.title: 1972 Datsun 240Z 4-Speed
listings.description: This 1972 Datsun 240Z is said to have remained in the care of its original owner until it was acquired by the seller in 2018, and it now shows 54k miles. Work since 2022 is noted to have involved retrimming the seats in white vinyl, resurfacing the cylinder head, replacing the valve stem seals, rebuilding the differential, and overhauling the…

listings.title: Supercharged 1991 Acura NSX 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1991 Acura is a Canadian-market NSX that has been fitted with a Comptech supercharger for its 3.0-liter VTEC V6, and additional modifications include a Walbro fuel pump, a radar detector, an Eclipse stereo, and a Comptech exhaust system, clutch, headers, and close-ratio gears for the five-speed manual transaxle.

listings.title: Original-Owner 1986 Mazda RX-7 GXL 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1986 Mazda RX-7 GXL was purchased new by the current owner from Anderson Mazda, Inc. of Loves Park, Illinois, and it shows 84k miles. The car is finished in Satin Gold Metallic over red velour and is powered by a 1.3-liter Wankel rotary paired with a five-speed manual transmission. Equipment includes a limited-slip differential, a sunroof,…

listings.title: 35k-Mile 2007 Subaru Impreza WRX STi
listings.description: This 2007 Subaru Impreza WRX STi was initially sold in California, moved to Arizona in 2014, and was acquired by the seller in 2019. It is powered by a turbocharged 2.5-liter flat-four that drives all four wheels through a six-speed manual gearbox and was modified with an IAG oil pan and air/oil separator, an Agency Power blow-off valve, a COBB…

listings.title: One-Family-Owned, 32k-Mile 2002 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2002 Honda S2000 was purchased new by the seller's father from Planet Honda Route 3 of Clifton, New Jersey, and it was inherited by the seller in 2015. The car has 32k miles and is powered by a 2.0-liter VTEC inline-four linked to a six-speed manual transmission and a limited-slip differential. It is finished in Sebring Silver Metallic over…

listings.title: 2002 Acura NSX-T 6-Speed
listings.description: This 2002 Acura NSX-T was purchased by the seller in 2007 and has remained registered in California since new. Powered by a 3.2-liter DOHC V6 paired with a six-speed manual transaxle, the car is finished in Silverstone Metallic over gray leather. Equipment includes staggered-diameter 16” and 17” aluminum wheels, a limited-slip differential, a…

listings.title: 1998 Honda Civic Type R
listings.description: This 1998 Honda Civic Type R spent time in Japan before it was acquired by the seller in 2026 and subsequently brought to the US. Finished in Championship White, the car is powered by a 1.6-liter B16B inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transaxle with a limited-slip differential. It rides on 15" seven-spoke alloy wheels and is further…

listings.title: 31-Years-Owned 1977 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 from “McKenna”
listings.description: This 1977 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was used on the set of the television series McKenna, during the first and only season that was filmed between 1994 and 1995. It starred Jennifer Love Hewitt, and the FJ40 was her character's vehicle. The truck was purchased by the seller from the show's producer in 1995 and has remained in Oregon since,…

listings.title: 32k-Mile 2009 Mazda RX-8 Grand Touring
listings.description: This 2009 Mazda RX-8 Grand Touring was initially delivered to Selma Mazda of Selma, California, and was purchased in 2024 by the seller, who has since added 16k of the 32k miles. The car is finished in Diamond Gray Metallic over black leather and is powered by a 1.3-liter Wankel rotary paired with a six-speed automatic transmission.

listings.title: 2006 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2006 Honda S2000 spent several years registered in California before moving to Washington, where it was purchased by the current owner’s father in July 2009. It remained in the state approximately 16 years before it was relocated to Arizona in November 2025. Finished in New Formula Red over black leather, the car is powered by a 2.2-liter…

listings.title: 1991 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ80
listings.description: This 1991 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ80 was repainted and modified following the seller's acquisition in 2021. It is finished in white over gray cloth and features an FZJ80-specification rear axle with disc brakes as well as retrofitted FZJ80 front brakes, a 2" Old Man Emu lift kit, and Bilstein shocks. The truck also has quad Holley Retrobright…

listings.title: 1975 Datsun 280Z 4-Speed
listings.description: This 1975 Datsun 280Z is said to have remained in the care of its original owner until it was acquired by the seller in 2015. Subsequent work involved repainting the body, rebuilding the 2.8-liter inline-six, and replacing the dash cap, headliner, valve cover gasket, distributor, and various suspension components.

listings.title: 24-Years-Owned 1992 Mazda MX-5 Miata 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1992 Mazda MX-5 Miata was purchased in 2002 by the seller, who has since added 8k of the 32k miles shown. The car is finished in Classic Red over black cloth and is powered by a 1.6-liter DOHC inline-four linked with a five-speed manual transmission. Equipment includes a black convertible soft top, 14" Daisy alloy wheels, an AM/FM/cassette…

listings.title: 1975 Toyota Celica 2000 GT 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1975 Toyota Celica 2000 GT is a left-hand-drive example that was sold new to its first owner in Switzerland and remained in their care until 2002. It was imported to the US in 2005 after being acquired by the current owner from its second owner, and has since remained as part of their collection.

listings.title: Original-Owner 2001 Mazda MX-5 Miata LS 5-Speed
listings.description: This 2001 Mazda MX-5 Miata LS was purchased new by the seller and shows 59k miles. It is powered by a 1.8-liter inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transmission and is finished in Sunlight Silver Metallic over Tan leather upholstery. Equipment includes a limited-slip differential, 16″ five-spoke alloy wheels, a tan soft top, a wind…

listings.title: 19k-Mile 2021 Toyota Land Cruiser URJ200 Heritage Edition
listings.description: This 2021 Toyota Land Cruiser is a Heritage Edition example that was registered in Mississippi until 2026 and now has 19k miles. Finished in Blizzard Pearl over black leather with bronze stitching, it is powered by a 5.7-liter V8 linked with an eight-speed automatic transmission, a dual-range transfer case, and a Torsen locking center differential.

listings.title: 743-Mile 2020 Nissan GT-R 50th Anniversary Edition
listings.description: This 2020 Nissan GT-R Premium is a 50th Anniversary Edition example that is finished in Bayside Blue over 50th Anniversary semi-aniline leather, and it remained under the care of its original owner until 2026. The car has 743 miles and is powered by a twin-turbocharged 3.8-liter V6 linked with a dual-clutch six-speed automatic transmission, an…

listings.title: 33k-Mile 1999 Honda Civic VP Sedan
listings.description: This 1999 Honda Civic VP sedan shows 33k miles and is powered by a 1.6-liter inline-four paired with a four-speed automatic transaxle. The car is finished in Clover Green Pearl over gray cloth and is equipped with 14" steel wheels with covers as well as front disc brakes, power steering, an AM/FM/CD stereo, air conditioning, and power locks.

listings.title: Original-Owner 1999 Subaru Impreza Outback Sport 5-Speed
listings.description: This 1999 Subaru Impreza Outback Sport was purchased new by the seller and is powered by a 2.2-liter flat-four linked to a five-speed manual transaxle and an all-wheel-drive system. It is finished in Silverthorn and Slate Metallic over patterned gray cloth upholstery and is equipped with power-adjustable side mirrors, 15" steel wheels, anti-lock…
